race_meta.race_name: DragonBet Safer Gambling Tools No Roar Tonight Novices' Hunters' Chase

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Actual winner corporal jackjones was not in model's ranked horses. Model focused too heavily on pre-race favorites. Top prediction was Corporal Jackjones (IRE) with 52.0% confidence.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Corporal Jackjones (IRE) > High Game Royal (FR), but actual result was Corporal Jackjones > High Game Royal. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Actual winner not found in market analysis. Market dynamics shifted unexpectedly from pre-race state.
